lines.english: is a rare person, one among millions, incomparable. ||7||
One is bad, and another good, but the One True Lord is contained in all.
One who takes the Support of the Naam, by Guru's Grace,
rare indeed is that Gurmukh, who realizes the One Lord.
His comings and goings cease, and he merges in the Lord. ||8||
Understand this, O spiritual teacher, through the support of the True Guru:
One who acts in harmony with the Guru's Will,
possess all virtues; they contemplate the True Lord.
Those who have the One Universal Creator Lord within their hearts,

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰਤੁ ਤਪਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਮਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਭੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: varat tapan kar man nahee bheejai |
lines.english: The mind is not softened by fasting or austerities.
Practicing restraint by Hatha Yoga, the body wears away.
O Nanak, is absorbed in the Truest of the True. ||9||4||
Raamkalee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਸਰਿ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਪੂਜੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: raam naam sar avar na poojai |1|
lines.english: Nothing else is equal to worship of the Lord's Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਮਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਸੰਗੁ ਕੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur sev manaa har jan sang keejai |
lines.english: Serve the Guru, O mind, and associate with the humble servants of the Lord.
The world reads the arguments, and is softened only by music.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮੁ ਜੰਦਾਰੁ ਜੋਹਿ ਨਹੀ ਸਾਕੈ ਸਰਪਨਿ ਡਸਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਜੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jam jandaar johi nahee saakai sarapan ddas na sakai har kaa ras peejai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The tyrannical Messenger of Death cannot touch you, and the serpent of Maya cannot sting you, when you drink in the sublime essence of the Lord. ||1||Pause||
Without the Lord's Name, they endure suffering and pain. ||2||
The Yogi draws the breath upwards, and opens the Tenth Gate.
In the three modes and corruption, they are born and die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਪੰਚ ਅਗਨਿ ਕਿਉ ਧੀਰਜੁ ਧੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: antar panch agan kiau dheeraj dheejai |
lines.english: The fire of the five passions burns within him; how can he be calm?
He practices inner cleansing and the six rituals of purification.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਸਾਸੁ ਲੀਜੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: raam naam bin birathaa saas leejai |3|
lines.english: But without the Lord's Name, the breath he draws is useless. ||3||
One who becomes Gurmukh conquers the body-fortress. ||4||
With filth within, he wanders around at places of pilgrimage.
The thief is within him; how can he taste the taste?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਤੁ ਪਇਆ ਦੋਸੁ ਕਾ ਕਉ ਦੀਜੈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: kirat peaa dos kaa kau deejai |5|
lines.english: He carries the karma of his own past actions; who else can he blame? ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਨੁ ਨ ਖਾਹਿ ਦੇਹੀ ਦੁਖੁ ਦੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: an na khaeh dehee dukh deejai |
lines.english: He does not eat food; he tortures his body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਸੂਚਾ ਕਿਆ ਸੋਚ ਕਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: man nahee soochaa kiaa soch kareejai |
lines.english: His mind is not pure, so what is the use of performing ritual cleansings?
The self-willed manmukh is born only to die, and be born again. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਥੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur giaan tripat nahee theejai |
lines.english: Without the Guru's wisdom, he is not satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਚੈ ਨਹੀ ਜਨਮਿ ਮਰੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: man har raachai nahee janam mareejai |
lines.english: Your mind shall merge into the Lord, and you shall not be reincarnated to die again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਿਆ ਕਰਮੁ ਕੀਜੈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: raam naam bin kiaa karam keejai |7|
lines.english: Without the Lord's Name, what can anyone do? ||7||
Go, and ask the True Guru, and associate with the Lord's humble servants.
Serve the Primal Lord, by chanting the Lord's Name.
Silence the mouse scurrying around within you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀਜੈ ॥੮॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak naam milai kirapaa prabh keejai |8|5|
lines.english: O Nanak, God blesses us with His Name, when He grants His Grace. ||8||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਹੀਐ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jo kaheeai so prabh te hoee |
lines.english: Whatever is said to be, is from You, O God.
The created Universe emanated from within You; there is no other at all.
Raamkalee, First Mehl:
He is the True Lord and Master, throughout the ages.
Creation and destruction do not come from anyone else. ||1||
Such is my Lord and Master, profound and unfathomable.
The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is a priceless jewel, a diamond.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਪਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਹੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਨ ਲਗੈ ਜਮ ਤੀਰੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin japiaa tin hee sukh paaeaa har kai naam na lagai jam teer |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Whoever meditates on Him, finds peace. The arrow of the Messenger of Death does not strike one who has the Name of the Lord. ||1||Pause||
The True Lord is in the home of the self; there is no doubt about it. ||2||
The True Lord Master is immortal and immeasurable.
That tongue which chants the True Name is pure.
Forgetting the Naam, they rot away in egotistical pride.
Without the Naam, what is the use of spiritual wisdom and meditation?

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਬਨ ਮਹਿ ਬੈਸਹਿ ਡੂਗਰਿ ਅਸਥਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: eik ban meh baiseh ddoogar asathaan |
lines.english: Some sit in the forests, and some make their home in the mountains.
The Gurmukhs are honored in the Court of the Lord. ||3||
Studying the scriptures, reading them to other people,
Acting stubbornly in egotism, one does not find the Lord.
